channel.title: Arjun M
channel.description: A journal, for mostly CS stuff, of Arjun

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I’m Arjun. I’m a Software Engineer based out of a city in the Southern part of India. Feel free to write to me via email -
item.content:encoded:
Hi, I’m Arjun.

I’m a Software Engineer based out of a city in the Southern part of India. Feel free to write to me via email - firstnamelastname at gmail dot com
